lung_cancer_smokers.description: Number of lung cancer cases who were smokers (case group, exposed).

lung_cancer_nonsmokers.description: Number of lung cancer cases who were nonsmokers (case group, unexposed). Calculated as 649 - 647 = 2.

control_smokers.description: Number of controls who were smokers (control group, exposed).

control_nonsmokers.description: Number of controls who were nonsmokers (control group, unexposed). Calculated as 649 - 622 = 27.
